text:
GG0170S3_WHEEL150_END_CD GG0170S3_WHEEL150_END_CD Ability to Wheel at Least 150 Feet in Corridor at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to wheel the wheelchair or scooter at least 150 feet in a corridor or similar space at
the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
